verses.text: A beh zui-in Simeon minam-a' ding aisan nihna hong tung hi. Amau' gamh in Judah minamte' gamh ngahsa pawkhat huam hi
Amau' ngah ding gamhte pen Beersheba, Sheba, Moladah
Hazarshual, Bala, Ezem
Eltolad, Bethul, Hormah
Ziklag, Bethmarkaboth, Hazarsusah
Bethlebaoth, leh Sharuhen — khuapi sawmlethum, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Tua ciangin Ain, Rimmon, Ether, leh Ashan — khuapi li a khuaneute tawh zong ahi hi
Negeb gam Ramah-a om Baalathbeer ciangdong hih khuapite' kiima om khuaneute khempeuh zong a huam ahi hi. Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Simeon minamte' luah ahi hi

Simeon minamte' luah in Judah minamte' gamsung khenkhat hong huam hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah minamte' ngah pen amau-a' dingin lianlua a, amau' luah sung panin Simeon minam in gamh ngahsawn uh hi.
A beh tawh kizui-in Zebulun minam-a' dingin aisan thumna hong tung hi. Amau' luah gam in Sarid ciangdong ban hi
Tua ciangin nitumna lamah a gamgi paito-in Mareal-ah paisuak a, Dabbesheth va su a, tua ciangin Jokneam nisuahna lama om lui a ban hi
Sarid panin nisuahna lam manawhin pai-in Khislothtabor gamgi-ah tung hi
Tua panin Daberath-ah pai-in Jafia ciang ban a, tua lai panin nisuahna lam Gathhefer, Ethkazin lamah paisuak a, tua ciangin Rimmon-ah pai lai-in Neah lamah a kawi hi
Tua ciangin leilu lam pan, Hannathon lamah gamgi kihei a, Iftahel kuamah a tawp hi
Tua ciangin Kattath, Nahalal, Shimron, Idalah, leh Bethlehem khuate zong huam a, khuapi sawmlenih, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Zebulun minamte' luah hi a, hih khuapite a khuaneute tawh ahi hi.
A beh tawh kizui-in Issakhar minamte-a' dingin aisan lina hong tung hi
A gam in Jezreel, Khesulloth, Shunem
Hafaraim, Shion, Anaharath
Rabbith, Kishion, Ebez
Remeth, Engannim, Enhaddah, leh Bethpazzez a huam hi
A gamgi in Tabor, Shahazumah, leh Bethshemesh zong ban a, Jordan-ah a tawp hi. Khuapi sawmleguk, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Issakhar minamte' luah hi a, a khuapite a khuaneute tawh ahi hi.
A beh tawh kizui-in Asher minamte-a' dingin aisan ngana hong tung hi
A gam in Helkath, Hali, Beten, Akshaf
Allammelek, Amad, leh Mishal huam hi. Nitumna lamah Karmel leh Shihorlibnath ban a
tua ciangin nisuahna lamah kihei-in Bethdagon-ah pai a, leilu lam Bethemek leh Neiel lamah Zebulun leh Iftahel kuam ban hi. Tua ciangin leilu lam Kabul
Ebron, Rehob, Hammon, Kanah, leh a Lian Sidon ciangdong paito lai hi
Tua ciangin Ramah-ah a gamgi kihei a, kulh a nei Taia khuapi a tung hi. Tua ciangin Hosah-ah gamgi kihei a, tuipi-ah a tawp hi. Mahalab, Akzib
Ummah, Afek, leh Rehob khuapite huam a — khuapi sawmnihlenih, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Asher minamte' luah hi a, hih khuapite a khuaneute tawh ahi hi.
A beh tawh kizui-in Naftali minamte-a' dingin aisan gukna hong tung hi
A gamgi pen Helef, Zaanannim-a om tawsaw, leh Adaminekeb, leh Jabneel panin Lakkum ciangdong pai-in Jordan-ah a tawp hi
Tua ciangin nitumna lam Aznothtabor-ah a gamgi kihei a, tua lai panin Hukkok-ah pai-in, leitaw lamah Zebulun ban a, nitumna lamah Asher banin, nisuahna lam panin Jordan-ah Judah a ban hi
Kulh a nei khuapite pen Ziddim, Zer, Hammath, Rakkath, Khinnereth
Adamah, Ramah, Hazor
Kedesh, Edrei, Enhazor
Iron, Migdalel, Horem, Bethanath, leh Bethshemesh — khuapi sawmlekua, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Naftali minamte' luah hi a, a khuapite a khuaneute tawh ahi hi.
A beh tawh kizui-in Dan minamte-a' dingin aisan sagihna hong tung hi
A luah gamte in Zorah, Eshtaol, Irshemesh
Shaalbim, Aijalon, Ithlah
Elon, Timnah, Ekron
Eltekeh, Gibbethon, Baalath
Jehud, Beneberak, Gathrimmon
leh Joppa galkhata om Mejarkon leh Rakkon a gamte tawh a huam hi

Dan mite in amau' gam a taan ciangun Dan mite kuanto-in Leshem sim uh a, amaute in a mite manin namsau tawh a thah khit uh ciangin tua gam luahin a sungah teng uh a, amau' pupi' min tamin Leshem pen Dan ci-in min a phuak uh hi
Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Dan minamte' luah hi a, hih a khuapite a khuaneute tawh ahi hi.
Israel mite in gamh-in tua leitangte a hawm khit uh ciangin amaute lakah Nun tapa Joshua tungah gamh a pia uh hi
Topa' thupiakna tawh ama nget khuapi, Efraim mualtung gama om Timnathserah a pia uh hi. Amah in tua khuapi lamkikin a sungah a teng hi

Hihte pen siampi Eleazar leh Nun tapa Joshua leh Israel minam beh lutangte in kikhopna bukkong, Topa' mai Shiloh-ah aisanna tawh a hawmkhiat uh gamh ahi hi. Tua bangin amaute in leitang hawmna a zo uh hi.
